productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Adi Sun M Olive Slippers
description: A classic summer collection and a great indoor footwear for winters, the Adi Sun slides from adidas originals is sleek, stylish and comfortable, making it a great buy.UpperSoft rubber footstrap with a toe separator for durability and to lock the foot in place in comfortSoft insole with adidas Originals logo printed on the heelOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with logo flowerlet grooves for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a damp, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
